change_description: Upgrade the Java runtime on all Minecraft servers from Java 17 to Java 21 for improved performance and security patches.
change_rollback_plan:
1. Stop affected servers
2. Restore Java 17 from backup
3. Update server startup scripts to use Java 17
4. Restart servers and verify
change_implement_plan:
1. Schedule maintenance window
2. Stop servers gracefully
3. Install Java 21 on nodes
4. Update startup scripts
5. Start servers and monitor
change_test_plan:
1. Test on staging server first
2. Verify server starts without errors
3. Join server and test basic gameplay
4. Check logs for warnings

change_subject: Add new backup schedule for customer data
change_description: Implement hourly incremental backups for all customer Nextcloud data in addition to the current daily full backups.
change_rollback_plan:
1. Disable new backup cron job
2. Remove incremental backup scripts
3. Verify daily backups still running
change_implement_plan:
1. Create incremental backup script
2. Configure retention policy (7 days)
3. Add cron job for hourly execution
4. Test backup and restore process
change_test_plan:
1. Run manual backup
2. Verify backup file created
3. Test restore to staging
4. Confirm data integrity

change_description: Deploy Grafana dashboard with custom panels for monitoring all game server instances including CPU, RAM, player count, and TPS metrics.
change_rollback_plan:
1. Remove Grafana container
2. Restore previous monitoring solution
3. Update DNS records if needed
change_implement_plan:
1. Deploy Grafana container
2. Configure Prometheus data source
3. Import dashboard templates
4. Set up alerting rules
5. Update documentation
change_test_plan:
1. Access Grafana UI
2. Verify all data sources connected
3. Check panels display correct data
4. Test alert notifications
